parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: { subject: $json.subject, body: { contentType: 'HTML', content: $json.htmlBody }, toRecipients: [{ emailAddress: { address: 'steve@portland-fuel.co.uk' } }], attachments: [{ '@odata.type': '#microsoft.graph.fileAttachment', name: 'company_lookup_results.csv', contentType: 'text/csv', contentBytes: $json.csvBase64 }] }, saveToSentItems: false }) }}

parameters.initialMessages: Paste a list of company names and I'll look up each one on Companies House and score the confidence of each match. Amelai will evaluate uncertain results.
parameters.agentDescription: Amelai is a privately hosted AI that can perform well enough for testing of AI concepts.

options.subtitle: Please enter a company name, a comma separated list of company names or a list with one company name per line to try to find the best matches of company registration numbers to match the name given.
options.title: Portland Company Reg No Lookup
